name: scatterbug
flavor_texts: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.
The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.
text: Scatterbug is the Scatterdust Pokémon. It is a bug-type Pokémon. Abilities: shield-dust, compound-eyes, friend-guard (hidden). Base stats — HP: 38, Attack: 35, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 27, Sp. Def: 25, Speed: 35. Evolution line: scatterbug → spewpa → vivillon. Lore: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact. The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.
